case_title: THE CITY TOW VS HERNANDEZ, ALEJANDRO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ALEJANDRO
